dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8216 IH: Improving Medicare Services Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. De La Cruz (for herself, Mr. Correa, and Mr. Barrett) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Ways and Means, and in addition to the Committee on Energy and Commerce, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned

form.official-title: To direct the Comptroller General of the United States to conduct a study relating to 1–800–MEDICARE.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Improving Medicare Services Act of 2026.

section.header: Directing the Comptroller General of the United States to conduct a study relating to 1–800–MEDICARE
section.text: Not later than 1 year after the date of the enactment of this Act, the Comptroller General of the United States shall conduct a study and submit to Congress a report on 1–800–MEDICARE. To the extent that data is available and reliable, such report shall include the following:

paragraph.text: An analysis of customer wait times and overall satisfaction.
An analysis of staffing competency and staffing levels.
A description of any improvements or downgrades in service areas previously studied in any prior report submitted by the Comptroller General.
Any recommendations for Congress or the Secretary of Health and Human Services relating to improving 1–800–MEDICARE.

A description of any actions taken by the Secretary of Health and Human Services or any contractor carrying out 1–800–MEDICARE in response to previous recommendations relating to 1–800–MEDICARE provided by the Comptroller General.
